title: Section 21D
content: 1[ 2[21D. Transitional provisions.--All complaints pending before the Council or any inquiry initiated by the Disciplinary Committee or any reference or appeal made to a High Court prior to the commencement of the Chartered Accountants (Amendment) Act, 2006 (9 of 2006), shall continue to be governed by the provisions of this Act, as if this Act had not been amended by the Chartered Accountants (Amendment) Act, 2006.]]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 15 of 1959, s. 19, for CHAPTER V (w.e.f. 1-7-1959). 2. Ins. by Act 9 of 2006, s. 19 (w.e.f. 17-11-2006).
